Prairie Rivers UMC District Office - Hispanic/Latino Ministry - Maria Lopez, diversity counselor from CCC, visits with my English students.
Recibimos muchísima información de las clases, becas y apoyo financiero a CCC (Community College) de María López. Ella es la consejera de la diversidad en Hastings, Grand Island and Columbus. Muchas gracias, María, por venir a mi clase de inglés y por hacer la presentación. ¡Eres una bendición!
We received so much information about classes, scholarships and financial aid at CCC from María López. She is the diversity counselor in Hastings, Grand Island and Columbus. Thank you very much, María, for coming to my English class and for making the presentation. You are a blessing!

Seoladh Comórtas Bonn Óir Seán Ó Riada sa bhliain 2009 agus ó shin i leith tá sé ag dul ó neart go neart. Tá an comórtas oscailte d'aon duine ó aon áit ar domhan. Reachtáiltear é via an suíomh idirlínne Cuireadh Chun Ceoil agus trí RnaG. Is don ceoltóir is fearr ar uirlis áirithe an comortas. Is féidir leis an iomathóir clárú ar an suiomh idirlinne. Ansan ní mór don iomathóir 5 fuaimrian a sheinnt gan tionlacan is iad a lódáil ar an suíomh. Tá sé seo go léir saor in aisce. Craoltar píosaí ceoil gach seachtain ar Raidió na Gaeltachta, agus bíonn ceolchoirm bheo ina mbíonn na 15 iomaitheoir deireanach páirteach ar siúl, beo ar aer, ó óstán i gCorcaigh ar thús na bliana. Bronntar Bonn Óir agus Sparán a bhfuil luach €2500 orthu ar an mbuaiteóir. Níl ach uirlis i gceist in aghaidh na blaina: 2012 - An Fidil, 2011 - Feadóga, 2012 - Cláirseach nó Píob, 2013 - na uirlisí giolcaigh miotail (Boscaí ceoil, concairtín 7rl) 2014 tharnasi chun an Fidil agus mar sin de.
The Seán Riada Gold Medal competition was launched in 2009 and has been gathering strength every year since. The competition is open to anyone anywhere in the world. It is for the best Irish Traditional Musician on a particular instrument in a given year. It is organised via the internet site Cuireadh Chun Ceoil and music from the competitors is broadcast in season on RnaG and world wide vie the internet. The competitor may enter for free and must upload 5 files of themselves playing unaccompanied. The final 15 are chosen by adjudicators and they are brought, in January of the following year, to Cork city where they compete live on radio. The Gold Medal and a purse of €2,500 is awarded to the winner. One instrument is the chosen disepline every year and these are on a rota: 2010 - The fiddle, 2011 - The flutes and whistles, 2012 - The Harp and the Pipes, 2013 - The metal reed instruments (Accordian, concertina etc.) 2014 back to the fidil and so on.

a) Medicine Degree. Graduated with Honors from the Faculty of Medicine of the National and Autonomous University of Mexico -UNAM-. 1977-1982. Professional number 838752.
b) Social Services in Basic Research. Pharmacology Department. National Institute of Cardiology "Ignacio Chávez". 1982-1983 Mentors Dr. Ignacio Chávez-Rivera and Dr. Rafael Méndez-Sanchez.
c) Rotatory Fellowship. General Hospital of México. Mexico Health and Assistance Secretary. 1983-1984.
d) Internal Medicine Fellowship. National Institute of Medical Sciences and Nutrition "Salvador Zubirán".1984-1987. Certified by the Mexican Board of Internal Medicine. Professional number 7288744.
e) Cardiology and Interventional Cardiology Fellowship. National Institute of Cardiology Ignacio Chavez. 1987-1990. Certified with First National Position by the Mexican Board of Cardiology; current certification 2014-2019. Professional number 7288742.
f) Founder and Director of the Cardiac Catheterization and Hemodynamic Laboratory. Miguel Hidalgo Hospital. Aguascalientes, México Health Secretary. 1990-1995.
g) Founder and Professor of the Cardiology Fellowship. Miguel Hidalgo Hospital. Aguascalientes, Mexico Health Secretary. 1994-1995.
h) Founder and Director of the Cardiac Catheterization and Hemodynamic Laboratory (Intercardio now Cardio-Cath). Central Médico Quirúrgica, Private Hospital. Aguascalientes Mexico. 1995-1997.
i) Former President Medical Auditory Subcommittee. Centro Hospitalario MAC, Private Hospital. 2009-2013.
j) Former President Aguascalientes Society of Cardiology 2012-2013.
